summary: Mobile catalog page audit complete at 375×812 viewport. Verified all major functionality: mobile header, breadcrumb, search, sort/filter sheets, vehicle cards, timer chips, action icons, consultation form. Found 1 critical bug: filter drawer backdrop not clickable due to pointer-events interception.

ui_bugs.issue: Filter drawer backdrop cannot be clicked to close drawer - drawer content intercepts pointer events
ui_bugs.details: When filter drawer is open, clicking the backdrop should close it. Currently, elements inside the drawer (Model label, filter controls) are intercepting pointer events on the backdrop. The backdrop has z-index: 1099 and drawer has z-index: 1100, but drawer content is somehow blocking backdrop clicks.
ui_bugs.recommended_fix: Ensure backdrop is properly layered and clickable. May need to adjust z-index stacking or add pointer-events: none to drawer body content while keeping it on the backdrop.

design_issues.issue: Footer appears scaled (using ScaledChrome + Footer1 desktop scaled) instead of dedicated mobile footer
design_issues.details: User flagged that footer appears scaled too small on mobile. Current implementation uses ScaledChrome wrapper which scales desktop footer. This is by design per BibiPublicLayout.js, but may need dedicated mobile footer component.

passed_tests: Mobile viewport set to 375×812
Mobile header renders at 80px height with BIBI logo + phones + hamburger
Breadcrumb visible: HOME / CATALOG with CATALOG in yellow
CATALOG title (H Bold 24) renders correctly
Search bar full-width, accepts focus and input
FOUND X RESULTS counter displays actual count (96 results)
Sort icon (24×24) opens bottom sheet from bottom
Sort sheet has drag handle (CSS ::before), group dividers (3 found)
Sort sheet contains sort options (found 10 options)
Selecting sort option (Newest) updates catalog and closes sheet
Filter icon (24×24) opens bottom sheet from bottom
Filter sheet has drag handle (CSS ::before)
Filter sheet has RESET ALL button (centered left column)
Filter sheet has APPLY FILTERS button (197×45 yellow, right column)
Filter sheet contains all sections: Vehicle Type icons, Brand select, Model select, Year range, Price range, Mileage range, Damage Status, SOURCE section, TECHNICAL SPECS section
Vehicle cards render in mobile layout (6 cards found)
Card image dimensions ~351×251px (close to expected 336×240)
Action icons (compare, favorite) overlay at 24×24 top-right
Timer chip displays countdown '3h: 33m' on cards with valid auction_date
Card title H SemiBold 20
LOT/VIN with copy buttons (14×14 icons)
Spec grid 2-col 4-row layout with 6 labels
Current Rate displayed at 24px medium
CTA button 'EXACT COST IN BULGARIA' full-width yellow
Compare icon clickable (POST to /api/compare/add)
Card navigation to /cars/:vin works
Show More button visible when more results available
Consultation spacer 128px gap from Show More to gray section
Consultation block renders: 'DON'T POSTPONE BUYING A CAR' title, 'Free consultation' subtitle
Consultation form has all fields: Full Name, Phone, Desired Vehicle, Budget, Additional Requirements
SEND REQUEST button present
Contact card with phone numbers at bottom of consultation block
Footer renders without errors

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - 1 high-priority bug found (filter backdrop), all other features working

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix filter drawer backdrop click issue: Elements inside the mobile filter drawer are intercepting pointer events on the backdrop, preventing users from closing the drawer by clicking outside. The backdrop element exists at z-index 1099 with pointer-events: auto when open, but drawer content (z-index 1100) is blocking clicks. Investigate CSS stacking context and pointer-events propagation. The close button (×) should work as alternative, but backdrop click is standard mobile UX pattern.
